Description: Minimal production-grade product analytics: user events sessions activation and retention-ready data in Postgres. Answers: Are users activating engaging and returning? No Kafka warehouse or third-party vendors in MVP.
Acceptance Criteria: Epic accepted when events persist activation tracked admin summary endpoint works and core app actions instrumented behind ENABLE_PRODUCT_ANALYTICS

Summary: Postgres schema for analytics events and sessions
Description: Add ctodashboard.analytics_events and analytics_sessions tables via canonical_schema.py and idempotent migration in postgres_store. Optional analytics_user_profiles for first_seen last_seen has_activated first_activation_time without breaking existing users table.
Acceptance Criteria: Tables created on fresh and existing DBs; UUID ids; metadata JSONB; indexes on user_id session_id event_name timestamp

Description: Implement services/analytics/event_tracker.py session_manager.py models.py with track_event(user_id event_name session_id metadata) start_session end_session get_current_session. Non-blocking writes; auto-create session; update last_seen.
Acceptance Criteria: track_event writes row; session event_count increments; 30min inactivity concept documented; unit tests for core functions

Description: Gate all analytics writes and summary endpoints behind ENABLE_PRODUCT_ANALYTICS default false. Expose in service_manager.py integrated_dashboard.py and GET /api/feature-flags.
Acceptance Criteria: Flag off: zero analytics DB writes; flag on: tracking active; existing auth and dashboard unchanged

Description: Track user_signup user_login dashboard_view on register login and dashboard route or post-auth dashboard load. Use authenticated user email or id consistently.
Acceptance Criteria: Events appear in analytics_events after signup login and dashboard visit; no PII in metadata beyond user_id

Description: Add lightweight trackAnalytics(event_name metadata) in dashboard.html and homepage calling POST /api/analytics/events. Fire page_view on load feature_used as fallback.
Acceptance Criteria: Anonymous homepage page_view optional; authenticated dashboard sends session_id cookie or header; failures do not break UI

Description: Define activation_event=report_generated. Track on CTOLens briefing generate attention refresh share link create and PDF export. Store first_activation_time and has_activated per user profile.
Acceptance Criteria: First report sets has_activated; time-to-activation computable from created_at; duplicate activations do not overwrite first time

Description: Track integration_connected on successful connector credential save/test. Track insight_viewed when user opens Overview briefing panel CTOLens panel or assignment metrics view.
Acceptance Criteria: Events fire once per meaningful action; metadata includes connector type or panel name where safe

Description: GET /api/analytics/users/me/activity or include in profile. Return total sessions total events last session duration activation status last seen.
Acceptance Criteria: Authenticated user receives accurate summary from DB; 404 or empty state for new users

Description: GET /api/analytics/summary admin-only. Return active users 7d total events 7d avg session duration activation rate returning user count. Simple JSON no charts.
Acceptance Criteria: Non-admin gets 403; admin sees correct aggregates; queries use indexes and complete under 2s on typical data

Description: Document and implement SQL helpers or summary fields for cohort analysis: users with events on day 0 and return on day 7/30. No UI required in MVP.
Acceptance Criteria: Helper functions or documented queries return cohort counts; data model supports analysis without schema change

Summary: Analytics pytest suite and smoke tests
Description: Add tests/test_analytics.py covering track_event session lifecycle activation once summary aggregates feature flag off noop.
Acceptance Criteria: pytest tests/test_analytics.py passes; full suite still green

Summary: Deploy analytics tables and env docs
Description: Update docs/DEPLOYMENT.md and CURRENT-ARCHITECTURE.md with ENABLE_PRODUCT_ANALYTICS rollout notes. Verify Railway migration on deploy.
Acceptance Criteria: Staging enables flag for internal QA; production rollout checklist documented
